command: echo Starting Jupyter Lab, please wait a moment... && python.exe -m jupyter lab "BASE_PATH_KEYWORD/NucleiSky/notebooks/Welcome.ipynb" --ServerApp.shutdown_no_activity_timeout=30 "--notebook-dir=~" --FileContentsManager.always_delete_dir=True && exit && echo Jupyter Lab has exited.

echo "Starting Jupyter Lab, please wait a moment..." && "BASE_PATH_KEYWORD/bin/python" -m jupyter lab "BASE_PATH_KEYWORD/NucleiSky/notebooks/Welcome.ipynb" --ServerApp.shutdown_no_activity_timeout=30 "--notebook-dir=~" --FileContentsManager.always_delete_dir=True && exit

echo "Starting Jupyter Lab, please wait a moment..." && "BASE_PATH_KEYWORD/bin/python" -m jupyter lab "BASE_PATH_KEYWORD/NucleiSky/notebooks/Welcome.ipynb" --ServerApp.shutdown_no_activity_timeout=30 "--notebook-dir=~" --FileContentsManager.always_delete_dir=True && exit
